AgentRemarks: Sited at short walk from the famous Eagle Nest with its Eaglets, is this spectacular cottage on the River.  This cottage is a guest house that is part of a public home. Just minutes away, the Wegmans shopping center features popular restaurants, retail, and everyday essentials. You’ll also love being close to the charm of downtown Yardley and Newtown Borough, known for boutique shopping, dining, and year-round community events

A large deck is perfect for outdoor dining, relaxing and hosting parties for friends and family. There is also a lovely in-ground pool for seasonal enjoyment. The home is conveniently located close to Newtown with an array of dining options, shopping and excellent schools. It is also convenient to I 95 with access to Philadelphia, and train stations for transportation to NYC.
